description: Topology-as-Logic replication on MathComp as an independent formal corpus inside the Coq ecosystem. Layer 1 (require_dependency) captures declared package dependency via Coq Require statements. Layer 2 (git_co_development) captures behavioral coupling via package co-change in git history. This run follows the same d1-d3 logic used in Lean mathlib4 and Coq Corelib, with corrected h2 protocol fields.

hypotheses.statement: MathComp shows positive cross-layer hub persistence between declared require_dependency structure and git_co_development behavior (Pearson r > 0 with permutation support).
The foundational package boot is the top betweenness hub in both require_dependency and git_co_development layers.
At least 2 MathComp packages show strong role divergence (betweenness rank gap >= 3) between require_dependency and git_co_development layers.
